label: The Sump Ledgerroom
description: The Sump Ledgerroom serves as The Lumen Sump’s sealed storage and inventory chamber, sunk behind the tavern’s ribbed bulkheads to preserve the port’s enforced quiet. Matte, light-absorbing composite surfaces bear stenciled tally grids and navigation hashmarks, while recessed guidance lamps render slow flow-maps across the ceiling for consistent orientation in attenuated light. Vacuum-rated shelving and strapped crate-racks line the walls in precise bays, separated by a narrow service aisle set with grated decking and drainage channels for decontamination runoff. A dark ceramic utility counter with plated conduit couplings anchors one end, integrating power, seal checks, and dust filtration into the room’s permanent fittings.
